title: Beyond Posidonia: Tracking the Pulse of Greek Dry Bulk Transactions:
section_path: Beyond Posidonia: Tracking the Pulse of Greek Dry Bulk Transactions:
section_path_text: Beyond Posidonia: Tracking the Pulse of Greek Dry Bulk Transactions:
summary:
Main
Image reference: unsplash-image-VDbFCDzsCUw.jpg | assets/2026-06-09_beyond-posidonia-tracking-the-pulse-of-greek-dry-bulk-transactions_img_unsplash-image-vdbfcdzscuw_cd5e00f8650c.jpg
By Eirini Diamantara & Dimitris Roumeliotis
As Posidonia week drew to a close, it offered an opportune moment to reflect on activity levels in the dry bulk Sale & Purchase (S&P) and newbuilding (NB) markets during the first five months of 2026, with particular focus on the presence and positioning of Greek interests. The S&P market has demonstrated notable momentum. A total of 378 dry bulk vessels changed hands during the Jan-May period, marking a 21% increase compared to the corresponding period in 2025.
